news.headline: From Ukraine to Iran, kamikaze drones are becoming indispensable to modern warfare
news.summary: As joint US-Israeli strikes on Iran began last week, the United States deployed LUCAS – a cheaper kamikaze drone modelled on Iran’s Shahed – for the very first time. news.summary: A facility in Kuwait, the site of the attack, is among 11 U.S. military outposts to have been hit by retaliatory strikes, along with French and British bases.
